productDisplayName: Lee Cooper Men Brown Casual Shoes
description: This stylish pair from lee cooper is your typical macho lifestyle shoe. The black finishing showcases a yin-yang appeal with white stitching, the button-front has a devil-red design at the fore while the smooth underbelly gives a refined touch. Faded jeans will work well with these shoes. Upper Crafted from leather with a suede patch on the side for style and durability Velcro closure and metal button embellishments for enhanced style Branding in red on the forefoot Stitch detailing for enhanced durability Mid-sole Padded, removable sock-liner to accommodate an orthotic PU mid-sole for exemplary comfort Out-sole TPU out-sole with patterned grooves for extra grip and flexibility Shoe care Remove dust and dirt with damp clean cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
